untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires custom trend line detection and parallel line construction (warning line and sell line at specific height intervals) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. The pattern specifically needs: (1) trend line identification, (2) lead-in height calculation, (3) parallel line drawing at precise offsets. These geometric/structural requirements are beyond the scope of standard technical indicators provided.
translation_notes: Attempted approximate entry using pivot-based reversal signal (crosses_below pivot as proxy for sell line breach). Exit uses mean-reversion logic (crosses_above sma_20). However, this is a weak approximation of the actual BARR pattern logic which fundamentally depends on custom trendline geometry not available in the indicator set. For accurate BARR implementation, custom pattern recognition code would be required.
